---
title: "LX / LFG"
subtitle: "Einführung in die Grammatiktheorie und in die computationelle Modellierung am Beispiel der Lexikalisch-Funktionalen Grammatik (LFG)"
# toc: true
# toc-depth: 3
# toc-expand: true

# format: |
#      html 
#      - pdf
# tmeta: $testmeta$
# date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: "2026-04-28"
title-meta: ""
bibliography: LFG.bib
cmeta: |
  class: [16849] Einführung in die Grammatiktheorie ::
  tutor: meinschäfer/gaglia ::
  term: SS26
  snc: 16184.1  
#[<< back to online paper <<](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/essais/papers/010/)  
#  arkiv: [<< the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >>](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links/?title=paperfoot&ref=paper-temp)
arkiv: 16162.tiny
# foot: the anarkkiv lankalevikki worksheet collection >> <https://ada-sub.dh-index.org/blog>
cfoot: |
  [duumy foot collection](https://stschwarz.userpage.fu-berlin.de/links/?title=paperfoot&ref=paper-temp)
---
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< meta cmeta >}}
:::
{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}} 

```{r,echo=F,eval=T}
print("engine on...")
#val <- quarto::quarto_metadata$get("meta")
#meta <- knitr::metadata
#params <- meta$
#val<-params$tmeta
val.f<-"fixed val"
val.c<-"{{< meta testmeta >}}"
val.c<-"{{< meta cmeta >}}"
```



# index
1. samling: margin notes general > [open](lfg-qa.qmd){.btn .btn-cat}
2. [class notes](lfg-001.qmd)
3. play along model training on corpus: having Claude devise grammar from synthetic text > [link](M1-pseudoL1.html)
